title: About AI Now Guide
description: AI Now Guide is a build-in-public video library documenting a real digital asset federation being built with AI-first systems.
body: AI Now Guide is the public-facing operating window into Krisada's digital asset portfolio. Every channel documents real work -- no scripts, no polished presentations. Just a 25-year SEO practitioner building AI-first websites, content systems, and federation architecture on camera.
